summary: Phase 2 testing: Admin Coaches tab, coach messaging UI, notifications, player messages inbox. Found and fixed a CRITICAL build-breaking bug (duplicate CoachNav export) and a missing import (CoachSettingsPage). After fixes, all Phase 2 UI flows verified working. Messaging APIs return 500 as expected (v11 migration not run yet).

minor.issue: Returns 500 — expected, v11 DB migration (coach_messages table) not yet run
Returns 500 — expected, v11 DB migration not yet run

ui_bugs.issue: Percentage stats show double '%' symbol (e.g. '44%%', '39%%') — pre-existing Phase 1 bug
Shows loading skeleton indefinitely when /api/player/messages returns 500 — empty state 'No messages yet' never renders. Will resolve once v11 migration is run.

bugs_fixed.issue: CRITICAL: Duplicate export function CoachNav declaration (lines 6 and 98). Caused SyntaxError that broke the entire frontend app. The second declaration (old version without Messages link) was renamed to _CoachNavOld_UNUSED to fix the build.
Missing import for CoachSettingsPage — caused ReferenceError at runtime crashing entire app router

action_items: IMPORTANT: Clean up CoachNav.js — remove the second CoachNav function body (_CoachNavOld_UNUSED) entirely to keep the file clean
Fix double %% in stats display on CoachPlayerProfile (Phase 1 pre-existing issue)
After running Supabase v11 migration, messaging endpoints (/api/coach/messages/sent, POST /api/coach/messages/:id, /api/player/messages) will work — retest messaging flow end-to-end
critical_code_review_comments: CoachNav.js had duplicate named exports — this is likely because E1 appended new code without removing old. Should be cleaned up.
App.js was missing CoachSettingsPage import — this crashed the entire router. All page imports must be validated when adding new routes.

features_verified.admin_coaches_tab: PASS — Coaches tab visible, loads coach list, All/pending/verified/rejected filters work
features_verified.admin_coaches_list: PASS — Test Coach shown with verified status
features_verified.admin_revoke_modal: PASS — Revoke button opens 'Reject Coach' modal with Notes field and Reject Coach/Cancel buttons
features_verified.admin_get_coaches_api: PASS — GET /api/admin/coaches returns 200 with coach list
features_verified.coach_messages_page: PASS — /coach/messages loads CoachMessagesPage with Send icon and empty state 'No messages sent yet'
features_verified.coach_nav_messages_link: PASS — Messages link with Send icon visible in CoachNav alongside Dashboard, Search Players, My Board
features_verified.coach_notifications_page: PASS — /coach/notifications loads CoachNotificationsPage with Bell icon and empty state
features_verified.coach_player_message_button: PASS — Blue Message button with Send icon visible in sticky header on player profile
features_verified.send_message_modal: PASS — Modal opens with Subject (optional) and Message fields, NCAA compliance footer text
features_verified.modal_close: PASS — Modal closes via X button and Cancel button
features_verified.player_messages_page: PASS — /messages route renders PlayerMessagesPage with 'Messages from Coaches' header
features_verified.player_nav_messages_link: PASS — Messages link appears in player nav sidebar

success_rate.backend: 100% (all non-messaging endpoints pass; messaging 500s are expected)
success_rate.frontend: 95% — all Phase 2 UI flows working after build fixes; minor pre-existing stat display bug

context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 2 is working after fixing 2 critical frontend build errors (duplicate CoachNav + missing CoachSettingsPage import). All admin, coach, and player UI flows verified. Messaging APIs will return 500 until v11 Supabase migration is run. After migration, re-test: SendMessageModal send flow, CoachMessagesPage list, PlayerMessagesPage inbox.
